steps.title: Separate two sentences
steps.content: The words before the blank form a complete sentence about ranching terms coming from Spanish. The words after the blank begin another complete sentence giving examples with "lasso" and "cinch."

steps.title: Reject broken punctuation
steps.content: Choice B opens a parenthesis without creating a proper sentence boundary. Choice C fuses two independent clauses. Choice D uses a question mark even though the first sentence is not a question. The answer is A.
